incident_templates.title: High Memory Usage - OOM Risk
incident_templates.description: Service experiencing high memory consumption approaching container limits. Risk of OOM killer termination.
incident_templates.root_cause: Memory leak in application code or insufficient memory allocation for workload

recommendations.reasoning: Restart to clear memory leak temporarily
Increase memory limits to prevent OOM

incident_templates.title: High CPU Usage - Throttling
incident_templates.description: CPU utilization exceeding 80% causing performance degradation and request throttling.
incident_templates.root_cause: Inefficient algorithm, infinite loop, or insufficient CPU allocation

incident_templates.title: Pod CrashLoopBackOff
incident_templates.description: Pod repeatedly crashing and restarting. Container exit code indicates application failure.
incident_templates.root_cause: Application startup failure: missing configuration, database connection failure, or code bug

recommendations.reasoning: Verify ConfigMaps and Secrets are mounted correctly

incident_templates.title: High Error Rate - 5xx Responses
incident_templates.description: Service returning elevated number of 5xx errors indicating internal failures.
incident_templates.root_cause: Backend service failure, database connection issues, or unhandled exceptions

recommendations.reasoning: Verify all dependent services are healthy
Verify database connection and query performance
Analyze error logs and stack traces

incident_templates.title: High Response Latency - P95 Degradation
incident_templates.description: API response times increased significantly. P95 latency exceeding SLO threshold.
incident_templates.root_cause: Slow database queries, external API delays, or resource contention

recommendations.reasoning: Identify slow queries and optimize indexes
Add more replicas to handle load
Profile slow requests and identify bottlenecks

incident_templates.title: Disk Space Exhaustion - 90% Full
incident_templates.description: Node disk usage approaching capacity. Risk of service disruption and pod eviction.
incident_templates.root_cause: Log accumulation, unrotated logs, or large temporary files

recommendations.reasoning: Expand volume size to prevent future issues
Identify source of disk space consumption

incident_templates.title: Pod Eviction - Resource Pressure
incident_templates.description: Kubernetes evicting pods due to node resource pressure (memory or disk).
incident_templates.root_cause: Node overcommitment or insufficient node capacity

incident_templates.title: Network Latency Spike - Timeout Errors
incident_templates.description: Network communication between services experiencing high latency and timeouts.
incident_templates.root_cause: Network congestion, CNI issues, or misconfigured service mesh

recommendations.reasoning: Verify network policies are not blocking traffic
Restart CNI and service mesh components
Trace network path and identify bottlenecks

incident_templates.title: Database Connection Pool Exhausted
incident_templates.description: Application unable to acquire database connections. Connection pool at maximum capacity.
incident_templates.root_cause: Connection leaks, insufficient pool size, or slow queries holding connections

recommendations.reasoning: Identify queries holding connections too long
Audit code for connection leak patterns

incident_templates.title: Certificate Expiration Warning - 7 Days
incident_templates.description: TLS certificate expiring soon. Risk of service disruption if not renewed.
incident_templates.root_cause: Expired certificate or cert-manager renewal failure

incident_templates.title: ImagePullBackOff - Registry Failure
incident_templates.description: Pod unable to pull container image from registry. Deployment blocked.
incident_templates.root_cause: Invalid registry credentials, network issues, or non-existent image

recommendations.reasoning: Verify image pull secret exists and is valid
Check if image tag exists in registry

incident_templates.title: Load Balancer Health Check Failures
incident_templates.description: External load balancer reporting unhealthy backend targets. Traffic routing failures.
incident_templates.root_cause: Application not responding on health check endpoint or port misconfiguration

recommendations.reasoning: Verify health check endpoint is responding
Check Service targetPort matches container port
